Container.Name: AppFlowy-Web
Container.Overview: AppFlowy Web — the browser-based AppFlowy client. Served at the root path / via the nginx proxy. Part of the AppFlowy Cloud stack.
Container.Description:
AppFlowy Web — the official browser client for AppFlowy Cloud. Accessed via AppFlowy-Nginx at http://YOUR_SERVER_IP/.

Deploy order: (1) AppFlowy-Postgres → (2) AppFlowy-Redis → (3) AppFlowy-MinIO → (4) AppFlowy-GoTrue → (5) AppFlowy-Cloud → (6) AppFlowy-Admin, AppFlowy-Web, AppFlowy-Worker, AppFlowy-Search → (7) AppFlowy-Nginx

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: Public-facing base URL. Must match Base URL in AppFlowy-Cloud. No trailing slash.

Config.Name: GoTrue Base URL
Config.Description: Public-facing GoTrue URL (used by the browser to reach the auth service).

Config.Name: WebSocket Base URL
Config.Description: WebSocket URL for real-time collaboration. Change ws:// to wss:// if using TLS.
